## Summary

Describe the public, user-facing reason for this change.

## Safety and verification

- [ ] The change contains no account, address, endpoint, device ID, credential, or private key.
- [ ] New and removed files are reflected in `manifest.json`.
- [ ] The final snapshot was rendered from the curated private source; any public proposal was ported there before merge.
- [ ] `scripts/verify-showcase.sh` passes locally.
- [ ] Relevant documentation is updated.
